narrative_text: A boy in striped pajamas sees a strange glow through his bedroom window at night. He grabs a small flashlight from his nightstand. His older sister with a green scarf hears him get up and follows him quietly down the stairs.
scene_description: A dimly lit bedroom at night where a curious boy in striped pajamas watches a mysterious golden light through a window. The atmosphere is tense yet magical, with deep navy tones and warm golden highlights. His sister watches him from the stairs, adding a sense of cautious movement to the still room.

entities.pose: standing with knees slightly bent and one arm reaching forward toward the nightstand

properties.distinctive_features: long green scarf wrapped around her neck

entities.pose: leaning forward while standing on a step with hands gripping the railing

properties.distinctive_features: bright yellow power button on the side
soft light rays emanating from a central point

title: The Light
